zh.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children)於1218年出生在英國諾福爾可斯萬頓 阿博特。她於1235年與Roger de Heveningham在英國英格蘭素福爾可維寧加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭素福爾可維寧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children)于1218年出生在英国諾福爾可斯萬頓 阿博特。她于1235年与Roger de Heveningham在英国英格兰素福爾可維寧加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰素福爾可維寧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Motley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English motley ‘motley, cloth or garments of a mixed color’, also ‘parti-colored, variegated’, presumably denoting someone who wore motley or made motley clothing.
habitational name from Mutley in Plymouth (Devon). The placename probably derives from Old English (ge)mōt ‘meeting’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing, glade’.

variants.name: Mottley
meanings: English (Lancashire and London): variant of   Motley  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) was born in 1218, in Swanton Abbot, Norfolk, England. She married Roger de Heveningham in 1235, in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) est née en 1218, à Swanton Abbot, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Roger de Heveningham en 1235, à Heveningham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Heveningham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) wurde 1218 in Swanton Abbot, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat 1235 in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Roger de Heveningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) è nata il nel 1218 nel Swanton Abbot, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato Roger de Heveningham nel 1235, nel Heveningham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel Heveningham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children)は1218年にイギリスノーフォルクスワントン アボットで生まれた。1235年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヘベニンガムでRoger de Heveninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリススフォルクヘベニンガムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children)(은)는 1218년 영국 노르폴크 스완턴 애벗에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤베닝함에서 Roger de Heveningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤베닝함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) nasceu em 1218, em Swanton Abbot, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Roger de Heveningham em 1235, em Heveningham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em Heveningham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) родилась в 1218 г. в местности свантон эббот, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Heveningham в 1235 г. в местности хивенингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности хивенингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) nació en 1218, en Swanton Abbot, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Roger de Heveningham en 1235, en Heveningham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en Heveningham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
